result.text:
#Mets fans kept trying to lecture me about A.J. Ewing not having the ability to hit for power -> when I referred to him as a legit 5-Tool talent.

Can I get an update? 

Forget the update -> I’d prefer people stop regurgitating what is written on https://t.co/ULsJbuUpW5 when they try to make an argument.

Maybe try watching the kid play ball -> do your own research.

Ewing may not be a perennial 25+ HR bat -> but he is 100% the type of hitter who can pop 4-5 HR in October, because pitchers thought they could sleep on him.

He will eventually develop into a 15-20 HR bat -> who will post above average batting averages & OBP’s.

This dude is a STAR -> and he’s only getting started…

#LGM  #MetsTwitter  https://t.co/fT5aybbgCq

legacy.full_text:
The Mets are currently operating with a 4-man rotation:

1.  Nolan McLean (4.01 ERA/3.38 xERA)
2.  Freddy Peralta (4.04 ERA/3.81 xERA)
3.  Christian Scott (3.10 ERA/4.42 xERA)
4.  Sean Manaea (5.02 ERA/4.19 xERA)

They have strong internal depth to fill the 5th starter spot.

result.text:
The Mets are currently operating with a 4-man rotation:

1.  Nolan McLean (4.01 ERA/3.38 xERA)
2.  Freddy Peralta (4.04 ERA/3.81 xERA)
3.  Christian Scott (3.10 ERA/4.42 xERA)
4.  Sean Manaea (5.02 ERA/4.19 xERA)

They have strong internal depth to fill the 5th starter spot. 

Depth Options:
David Peterson (5.75 ERA/4.71 xERA)
Jonah Tong (3.60 ERA/3.87 xERA)
Kodai Senga (9.00 ERA/4.73 xERA)
Tobias Myers (4.05 ERA/3.39 xERA)
Zach Thornton (8.31 ERA/8.31 xERA) 
Jack Wenninger (NA)

One of these arms just needs to step up and lock it down until Clay Holmes returns from the IL to stabilize the group. 

#LGM

result.text:
#Mets FA acquisition Luke Weaver is quietly having the season we desperately needed him to have after signing.

25 SCORELESS outings -> 89% 

13 HITLESS outings 

He didn’t give up a run for the ENTIRE month of May.

ELITE Numbers across the board -> providing exactly what we didn’t have from our key RP last season:

7%   BB-Rate  |  0.186 BAA  |  0.93 WHIP 

Solid splits versus LHB -> DOMINATING RHB.

With A.J. Minter back & H. Brazoban elevating his game, #Mets should be able to make sure they aren’t overused.

#LGM  #MetsTwitter 
 https://t.co/uS13CO1CtL
